title: gochnatia recurva
intro: Gochnatia recurva, also known as the recurved Gochnatia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Americas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Gochnatia recurva can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
